title: Turbo Tax Commercials
subtitle: The First Misuse of the Blade; reactive discernment and truth-sensitivity
description: An artifact documenting reactive discernment following the acquisition of 'Ludus Veritatis'. It captures a calibration moment where truth-recognition is misapplied outward as irritation and critique of media manipulation, marking the threshold before the blade is turned inward.

motifMap.meaning: Applying truth-recognition externally to confirm tool efficacy before inward application.

excerpt: I learned to see through things—and for a moment, that made me angry instead of wise.
